rule_description: Conventional loans require minimum credit score of 620
FHA loans require minimum credit score of 580 for 3.5% down payment
Debt-to-income ratio must not exceed 43% for qualified mortgages
FHA allows DTI up to 50% with compensating factors
Conventional loans typically require minimum 3-5% down payment
Private Mortgage Insurance required when LTV exceeds 80%
Income must be verified with 2 years tax returns and recent pay stubs
Identity must be verified per BSA/AML requirements
Property must be appraised by licensed appraiser
Reserves of 2-6 months PITI recommended based on LTV and credit
Borrower must intend to occupy property as primary residence
Minimum 2-4 years wait after bankruptcy discharge
Special programs available for first-time homebuyers
